name: Register-PackageSource

options.name: -Credential
options.description: Specifies a user account that has permission to access the authenticated location.

options.name: -Force
options.description: Forces the command to run without asking for user confirmation.

options.name: -ForceBootstrap
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet automatically installs the package provider.

options.name: -Name
options.description: Specifies the name of the package source to register.

options.name: -Proxy
options.description: Specifies a proxy server for the request, rather than a direct connection to the internet resource.

options.name: -ProxyCredential
options.description: Specifies a user account that has permission to use the proxy server that is specified by the Proxy parameter.

options.name: -SkipValidate
options.description: Switch that skips validating the credentials of a package source.

options.name: -Trusted
options.description: Indicates that the package source is trusted.

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.

description: Adds a package source for a specified package provider.
